name: cpicker
description: Browser-based coordinate picker. Replaces coordinate_picker.py. Runs as a static HTML file — no server needed.
hosting: Netlify or GitHub Pages (static, free, always-on)

files.web/cpicker.html: Entry point. Loads canvas, toolbar, modal dialog elements.
files.web/cpicker.js: All picker logic: modes, node CRUD, sequence building, file I/O.
files.web/shared.js: imgToScreen, screenToImg, drawHeadingArrow, findNodeAt, advanceAlongPath, drawGrid, drawHeadingLegend.
files.web/style.css: Dark theme, toolbar, modal, sequence panel, mode badge.

SEQUENCE.node: string — must match a key in NODES

_action_rules.move: AGV passes through; no trolley state change. Auto-assigned for waypoints.
_action_rules.pickup: AGV attaches trolley at this node. Trolley travels with AGV from here.
_action_rules.release: AGV detaches trolley. Trolley stays at this node position.
_action_rules.exchange: AGV releases current trolley and picks up a different one at same node.

backward_compat: If SEQUENCE contains plain strings instead of {node, action} objects, treat each as {node: str, action: 'move'}.

canvas.background: User-loaded PNG via <input type=file> in startup modal
canvas.transform: Manual offsetX/offsetY/zoom math — same as pygame version

NODE.trigger: Default on load, or press E
NODE.left_click: Open <dialog> node form at click position
NODE.crosshair: Red crosshair drawn on canvas while no form is open

SEQUENCE.left_click_on_seq_point: Show inline action picker panel near mouse; append on button click
SEQUENCE.hover: White ring around nearest node within 18px

forms.startup_modal: HTML <dialog>: filename input, optional load-existing JSON, optional background image load.
forms.node_form: HTML <dialog>: ID text input, type toggle (waypoint/seq_point buttons), heading number input.
forms.action_picker: Floating <div> near click position. Buttons: Move / Pickup / Release / Exchange. Dismisses on selection or outside click.

overlays.sequence_panel: Right-side fixed <div>. Scrollable list of SEQUENCE entries (index + node ID + action badge).
overlays.type_legend: Top-left fixed <div>: yellow dot = waypoint, green dot = seq_point.
overlays.mode_badge: Top-center fixed <div>: NODE MODE | SEQUENCE MODE chip.
overlays.hud_bar: Bottom fixed <div>: cursor image coords, zoom, node count, seq count, filename, keyboard hints.

visuals.heading_arrow: Arrowhead from dot center in heading direction, same color as dot
visuals.heading_legend: Compass rose top-right corner of canvas: 0/90/180/270

file_io.load_image: <input type=file accept=image/*> in startup modal → FileReader → drawImage on canvas
file_io.load_json: <input type=file accept=.json> in startup modal → JSON.parse → populate NODES + SEQUENCE
file_io.save_json: S key → JSON.stringify → Blob → <a download=filename> programmatic click

keyboard.Escape: Close form if open; no-op otherwise

zoom_pan.implementation: ViewState = {offsetX, offsetY, zoom}. On scroll: anchor zoom to cursor position. On middle-drag: shift offset.

shared_js_api.drawHeadingArrow: (ctx, cx, cy, deg, length, color, width=2) => void
shared_js_api.findNodeAt: (sx, sy, nodes, view, hitRadius=18) => nodeId | null

implementation_phases.name: Canvas scaffold
tasks: HTML skeleton with canvas, overlays, dialogs
shared.js: ViewState, coord transforms, drawing utilities
style.css: dark theme, dialog, panel, badge styles
Image load via startup modal → fit to canvas
Zoom/pan mouse handlers (scroll, middle-drag)
requestAnimationFrame draw loop

implementation_phases.name: Node placement (NODE mode)
tasks: Left-click → record pending {x,y} → open node <dialog>
Type toggle buttons (waypoint / seq_point)
Save node to state.nodes on confirm
Draw dots, heading arrows, labels
Right-click to remove last node
Red crosshair while no modal open

implementation_phases.name: Sequence building (SEQUENCE mode)
tasks: E key toggles mode; updates mode badge
Hover hit detection → white ring on nearest node
Left-click waypoint → auto-append {node, action:'move'}
Left-click seq_point → show action picker float panel
Action picker: 4 buttons → append chosen action
Draw sequence polyline + step index numbers
Right-click removes last sequence entry
Sequence panel DOM list updates reactively

implementation_phases.name: File I/O + polish
tasks: Startup modal: filename input, load JSON, load image
S key → download JSON as {NODES, SEQUENCE}
Backward compat: plain-string SEQUENCE entries → {node, action:'move'}
Heading legend (compass rose) drawn on canvas
Type legend + mode badge DOM overlays
HUD bar: live coords, zoom, counts, filename
